## Summary

## Content changes

<!-- Skip this section if PR is code-only. -->
- [ ] New/changed entries have `last_verified` ≤ 30 days old
- [ ] Every factual claim cites a source in `sources[]`
- [ ] `poc_volatile: true` entries have at least one T1 source
- [ ] No quoted content from closed Facebook/Discord groups
- [ ] Profile tags default to `any` except where narrowing prevents confusion

## Code changes

<!-- Skip this section if PR is content-only. -->
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
- [ ] `npm run audit` passes
- [ ] `npm run verify-links` passes (or failures are pre-existing)
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (or noted why not)
